nasb.text: They entered into the covenant to seek the Lord God of their fathers with all their heart and soul;

esv.text: And they entered into a covenant to seek the Lord, the God of their fathers, with all their heart and with all their soul,

cnv.text: 他們也立約，要一心一意尋求耶和華他們列祖的　神。

ccb.text: 他们又与他们祖先的上帝耶和华立约，要全心全意地寻求祂。
